titlestmt.titleproper: Office of the Vice President, Division of Campus Life records4-6-1621
titlestmt.author: Compiled by RMC Staff

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2023-08-22 00:02:00 UTC.
profiledesc.langusage: Description is written in: Undetermined, Code for undetermined script script.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: Office of the Vice President, Division of Campus Life records

origination.label: Creator
origination.corpname: Cornell University. Vice President for Campus Affairs. Division of Campus Life

did.abstract: Records of William D. Gurowitz, including personnel, payroll, budget, and general office files.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Records of William D. Gurowitz, including personnel, payroll, budget, and general office files.

relatedmaterial.head: RELATED MATERIALS
relatedmaterial.p: See also Cornell University Office of the Vice President for Student Affairs Records, #4-6-904, Cornell University Office of the Vice President for Student Affairs Records, #4-6-1182, and Division of Student and Academic Services Records, #4-16-2926.

accessrestrict.head: Access Restrictions:
accessrestrict.p: Access restricted to the permission of the office of origin.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Vice President for Campus Affairs, Division of Campus Life. Records. #4-6-1621. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

odd.head: General
odd.p: Boxes 105, 108, and 113 returned to the office of origin.

unittitle.extref: Link to a copy of the finding aid. PDF file.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: All the following files returned to V.P. Palmer's Office for good. N. Dean 3-26-92
